subjects.description: young student taking notes in an ancient library
subjects.appearance_details: focused learner seated cross-legged, leaning over a tattered notebook with careful hand movements
subjects.relationship: primary human subject studying alone among old books
subjects.location: center frame on a plush worn rug beneath a vintage lamp
subjects.relative_size: medium human figure surrounded by towering shelves
subjects.orientation: facing downward toward the open notebook and lamp glow
subjects.pose: cross-legged, slightly hunched in concentration, notebook resting close
subjects.action: reads from old material and diligently writes notes in the notebook
subjects.state_changes: pencil moves, page edges shift, lamp glow flickers slightly, dust motes drift
subjects.clothing: simple student clothing in muted tones suited to quiet study
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: natural warm-lit skin with soft shadows and realistic texture
subjects.facial_features: youthful face, attentive eyes, relaxed brow, mouth set in concentration

background_setting: Ancient dimly lit library with towering wooden bookshelves, leather-bound centuries-old volumes, a plush worn rug, a vintage lamp, dust in the air, and narrow aisles forming a scholarly labyrinth.

lighting.conditions: Soft amber lamp glow pools around the student while the surrounding shelves fall into deep warm shadow.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Soft amber lamp glow pools around the student while the surrounding shelves fall into deep warm shadow.

aesthetics.composition: Old-world scholarship, aged paper, dark wood, dust motes, worn fabric, and intimate quiet concentration.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Old-world scholarship, aged paper, dark wood, dust motes, worn fabric, and intimate quiet concentration.

cinematography.camera_motion: Low medium shot from rug level with shallow focus on the notebook, followed by a slow reveal of the towering shelves.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Atmospheric academic realism with warm chiaroscuro and tactile antique detail.
context: A young student studies deep inside an ancient library, taking notes by lamp light amid shelves of centuries-old books.

actions.description: The student sits cross-legged on the worn rug, eyes fixed on the tattered notebook under the vintage lamp.
They write carefully, turn a fragile page, and continue taking notes as dust drifts through the amber light.
The camera reveals the surrounding maze of wooden shelves and old leather-bound volumes.

text_and_signage_elements.text: Small handwritten notes appear in the tattered notebook without readable exact wording.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: visible during the relevant shot interval

segments.description: Establish the student on the rug, the lamp, and the notebook in the ancient library.
segments.key_changes: Warm lamp glow isolates the student from the dark shelves.
segments.camera: Low medium shot from rug height.

segments.description: Focus on note-taking and page movement.
segments.key_changes: Pencil strokes appear, paper rustles, dust motes cross the light beam.
segments.camera: Close-up on hands and notebook with shallow focus.

segments.description: Reveal the towering shelves and scholarly atmosphere around the student.
segments.key_changes: Library scale expands while the student remains quietly absorbed.
segments.camera: Slow pullback and slight upward tilt.

temporal_caption: A young student sits cross-legged in an ancient dim library, taking notes in a tattered notebook under a warm vintage lamp.
audio_description: Quiet room tone, faint pencil strokes, soft page rustles, distant wood creaks, and muted dust-filled stillness.
